RF_Anonymity.label: Anonymity / Pseudonymity
RF_Anonymity.rationale: Primary enabler of ML/TF; FATF flags this as a highest concern factor.

RF_3rd_Party_Pay.label: Third-Party Funding
RF_3rd_Party_Pay.rationale: Obscures beneficial ownership and source of funds; high risk for layering.

RF_Bearer.label: Bearer Instrument
RF_Bearer.rationale: Bearer instruments are effectively untraceable and treated as critical risk.

RF_Pooled.label: Pooled/Nominee Accounts
RF_Pooled.rationale: Obscures individual flows and beneficiaries; high layering risk.

RF_Instant.label: Instant/Real-time Rails
RF_Instant.rationale: Reduces time for controls and reporting; high velocity risk.

RF_Cross_Border.label: Cross-Border Capability
RF_Cross_Border.rationale: Increases jurisdictional complexity and sanctions circumvention risk.

RF_High_Value.label: High Transaction Capacity
RF_High_Value.rationale: Large value capacity magnifies ML impact; critical for rating scaling.

RF_24_7.label: 24/7 Operations
RF_24_7.rationale: Always-on systems limit manual intervention windows by compliance staff.

RF_Cash_In.label: Physical Cash Placement
RF_Cash_In.rationale: Cash remains a top ML vulnerability during the placement phase.

RF_Cash_Out.label: Physical Cash Extraction
RF_Cash_Out.rationale: Easy extraction of value is a critical control gap for laundering cycles.

RF_Asset_Conv.label: Asset Conversion
RF_Asset_Conv.rationale: Conversion to gold, crypto, or vouchers facilitates layering.

RF_Audit_Gap.label: Audit Trail Gaps
RF_Audit_Gap.rationale: Lack of immutable trails makes forensic investigations nearly infeasible.

RF_Complexity.label: Product Complexity
RF_Complexity.rationale: Multi-party/intermediary flows increase opacity and monitoring difficulty.

RF_Low_Reg.label: Regulatory Arbitrage
RF_Low_Reg.rationale: Operating in lightly regulated spaces or offshore increases systemic risk.

RF_Easy_Onboard.label: Low-Friction Onboarding
RF_Easy_Onboard.rationale: Low barriers to entry increase the likelihood of account misuse.

RF_Remote.label: Non-Face-to-Face Access
RF_Remote.rationale: Remote access raises identity spoofing and verification challenges.

RF_Agent.label: Agent Networks
RF_Agent.rationale: Adds cash access risk but can be mitigated via agent-level oversight.

RF_Flexibility.label: Product Flexibility
RF_Flexibility.rationale: High transferability between rails increases laundering layering options.

RF_New_Tech.label: Emerging Technology
RF_New_Tech.rationale: Blockchain and tokenization bring novel anonymity and traceability issues.

MF_KYC.label: Basic KYC / CDD
MF_KYC.rationale: Identity verification prevents anonymous accounts; highly effective if mandatory.

MF_EDD.label: Enhanced Due Diligence
MF_EDD.rationale: Critical for high-risk cohorts (PEPs); materially reduces risk of high-value misuse.

MF_SoW_SoF.label: Source of Wealth/Funds
MF_SoW_SoF.rationale: Addresses layering/integration; highly effective for large private banking flows.

MF_Usage_Limits.label: Transaction/Balance Caps
MF_Usage_Limits.rationale: Practical and effective at limiting the placement scale of illicit funds.

MF_Velocity_Ctrl.label: Velocity Throttling
MF_Velocity_Ctrl.rationale: Slows suspicious flows, enabling manual review of instant rails.

MF_Geo_Fence.label: Geographic Restrictions
MF_Geo_Fence.rationale: Enforces sanctions and blocks high-risk corridors; prevents cross-border leakage.

MF_Cash_Cap.label: Cash Reporting & Caps
MF_Cash_Cap.rationale: Directly mitigates placement risk; effective for cash-heavy operations.

MF_Audit_Trail.label: Immutable Audit Trail
MF_Audit_Trail.rationale: Essential for investigations and SAR filings; provides record retention.

MF_Tx_Monitor.label: Automated Transaction Monitoring
MF_Tx_Monitor.rationale: Core detection control; identifies patterns of suspicious behavior programmatically.

MF_MFA.label: Multi-Factor Authentication
MF_MFA.rationale: Reduces account takeover fraud; secondary AML benefit for remote access.

MF_Agent_Onboard.label: Agent Oversight
MF_Agent_Onboard.rationale: Strong agent KYC and training reduces risk in physical retail networks.

MF_Closed_Loop.label: Closed Ecosystem
MF_Closed_Loop.rationale: Restricting convertibility or external rails reduces laundering exit paths.
